title: Haghpat Apple Festival
excerpt: Annual harvest celebration around the monastery walls, with local cider, dried-fruit vendors, folk music, and the season's last apricot brandy.

title: Sanahin Craft Market
excerpt: Craftspeople from across Lori gather in the monastery courtyard for a two-day market of ceramics, wool textiles, carved stone, and highland honey.

title: Poet's Trail Reading Weekend
excerpt: A two-day programme of readings, walks, and conversations along the highland trail that connects the villages associated with Hovhannes Tumanyan, Armenia's national poet.

title: Lori Fortress Night Tour
excerpt: Guided evening tours of the 11th-century Lori Berd fortress, timed to arrive at the canyon-spur viewpoint at dusk. Lanterns provided. Maximum 12 people per tour.

title: Debed Jazz Days
location: Alaverdi, outdoor stage by the river
excerpt: Three evenings of jazz and contemporary music on an open-air stage above the Debed River. Armenian and Georgian ensembles, one international headliner, and the gorge as acoustic backdrop.

title: Pambak Honey Fair
excerpt: Beekeepers from the Pambak sub-alpine meadows bring their season's first harvest to the dendropark gates. Tastings, direct sales, and a guided walk through the park's lime-tree avenue.

title: Vanadzor Winter Film Festival
excerpt: A four-day festival of documentary and short film focused on the South Caucasus region. Screenings, filmmaker Q&As, and a competition section for films made in Lori Province.

title: Stepanavan Botanical Walk
excerpt: Annual guided walk through the dendropark's 170-species collection, timed to the late-May canopy flush when the overlapping greens of oak, hornbeam, walnut, and catalpa are at their most saturated.
